Name: PARTS_BREAK_PARAM_ST
Description: Defines the behavior of broken parts.

Fields.Name: Part Weight
Fields.Description: Override value for ragdoll weight physics behavior. -1 disables override. 0 causes the object to be treated as a rigid body.

Fields.Name: Body SFX Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Specifies the dummy poly for SFX playback when broken. -1 uses the origin.

Fields.Name: Part SFX Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Specifies the dummy poly for SFX playback when broken. -1 uses the origin.

Fields.Name: Body SFX ID
Fields.Description: Specifies the SFX to use for the body when broken.

Fields.Name: Part SFX ID
Fields.Description: Specifies the SFX to use for the part when broken.

Fields.Name: Base Speed At Break
Fields.Description: The base initial speed used to move the weapon away from the target at the moment of detachment, in m/s. Note that this speed is independent of weight.

Fields.Name: Part Break Animation Type
Fields.Description: How to animate the detached parts.

Fields.Name: Part Explosion SFX Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Part dummy poly for explosion SFX playback. -1 uses the origin.

Fields.Name: Body Explosion SFX Dummy Poly ID
Fields.Description: Body dummy poly for explosion SFX playback. -1 uses the origin.

Fields.Name: Part Explosion SFX ID
Fields.Description: Specifies the SFX to use for the part explosion.

Fields.Name: Body Explosion SFX ID
Fields.Description: Specifies the SFX to use for the body explosion.
